risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Support 'Update drivers through Device Manager in Windows' belgesinden alinmistir. Yanlis surucunun geri alinmasi donanimi calismaz duruma getirebilir. Microsoft sarti: 'You must be signed in with administrator permissions to roll back drivers.'
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Support 'Update drivers through Device Manager in Windows'. Rolling back the wrong driver may break hardware. Microsoft requirement: 'You must be signed in with administrator permissions to roll back drivers.'

prerequisites.tr: Sorun cikaran cihazi/surucusu tespit etmis ol

body.tr: 1) Start menusune sag tikla > Device Manager. 2) Ilgili cihaz kategorisinin yanindaki oka tikla. 3) Cihaza sag tikla > Properties. 4) Driver sekmesini sec. 5) 'Roll Back Driver' dugmesine tikla. 6) Sebep istendikten sonra Yes ile onayla. Gerekirse yeniden baslat.
body.en: 1) Right-click Start menu > Device Manager. 2) Select arrow next to category to expand. 3) Right-click device > Properties. 4) Select Driver tab. 5) Click 'Roll Back Driver'. 6) Choose a reason when prompted, Yes to confirm. Restart if prompted.

title.en: If 'Roll Back Driver' button is grayed out

body.tr: Onceki surucu yedegi sistemde tutulmamis demektir. Microsoft Q&A'lara gore yaygin sebep: Windows Update sirasinda eski surucu temizlendi. Cozum: Step 4'teki manuel yontemi kullan (uretici sitesinden eski versiyon).
body.en: Means no previous driver was kept by the system. Per Microsoft Q&A, common cause: Windows Update purged the old driver. Workaround: use the manual method in Step 4 (older version from vendor).

title.tr: Manuel eski surucu yukleme (Microsoft Device Manager yontemi)
title.en: Manual older driver install (Microsoft Device Manager method)

body.tr: 1) Donanim ureticisinin (Intel/NVIDIA/AMD/anakart OEM) sitesinden eski versiyonu indir. 2) Device Manager > cihaza sag tikla > Update driver > 'Browse my computer for drivers'. 3) 'Let me pick from a list of available drivers' > 'Have Disk' > indirilen .inf dosyasini sec.
body.en: 1) Download older version from hardware vendor site (Intel/NVIDIA/AMD/motherboard OEM). 2) Device Manager > right-click device > Update driver > 'Browse my computer for drivers'. 3) 'Let me pick from a list of available drivers' > 'Have Disk' > select the downloaded .inf file.

title.en: Block Windows from re-installing the new driver

body.tr: Microsoft'un resmi araci 'Show or hide updates troubleshooter' (wushowhide.diagcab). Microsoft Q&A'larda da onerilir. Aracta sorunlu surucu guncellemesini 'hide' et - Windows Update onu bir daha gostermez.
body.en: Microsoft's official tool 'Show or hide updates troubleshooter' (wushowhide.diagcab). Recommended in Microsoft Q&As. Use it to 'hide' the offending driver update - Windows Update won't show it again.
